Migrate this Angular 6 project to Angular 7.

Steps:
1. Update Angular dependencies from version 6 to 7
2. Update Angular CLI to version 7 if required
3. Update RxJS, TypeScript, and zone.js to Angular 7 compatible versions
4. Replace deprecated APIs and fix breaking changes
5. Update configuration files (if any required changes from Angular 6 → 7)
6. Fix compilation errors and runtime issues
7. Ensure the application builds and runs successfully

Commands to consider:
- ng update @angular/cli@7 @angular/core@7
- npm install
- ng build
- ng serve

Output:
- List of updated files
- Commands executed
- Summary of changes
- Any remaining warnings or manual fixes required
